title: clinopodium banaoense
intro: Clinopodium banaoense, also known as Banao Clinopodium, is a species of flowering plant in the mint family Lamiaceae, native to the Philippines. Traditionally, the plant has been used in folk medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Clinopodium banaoense include treating respiratory issues such as coughs and colds, as well as relieving pain and reducing fever. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used to make teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are then consumed to harness its medicinal properties.
